basic_details.job_title: Mormugao Port Authority Media Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Mormugao Port Authority has published the Media Coordinator Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Media Coordinator position. Candidates within the age range of up to 45 years and holding qualifications such as Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree in Mass Communication or Journalism with PG Diploma in Media/Mass Communication/Public Relations along with knowledge of Konkani and Marathi are eligible to apply offline at the official website mptgoa.gov.in. The application process will remain active until 15 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application d

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Arts in Mass Communication / Bachelor in Journalism or Mass Communication with P. G. Diploma in Media / Mass Communication / Journalism / Digital PR/ Social Media / Advertising / Public Relations, Master of Arts in Mass Communication / Master in Journalism or Mass Communication, Knowledge of Konkani and Marathi, 3 years experience in Executive / Supervisory cadre
qualification.details: Media Coordinator: Bachelor of Arts in Mass Communication / Bachelor in Journalism or Mass Communication with P. G. Diploma in Media / Mass Communication / Journalism / Digital PR/ Social Media / Advertising / Public Relations. Or Master of Arts in Mass Communication / Master in Journalism or Mass Communication. Knowledge of Konkani and Marathi is essential. Experience: Experience in Executive / Supervisory cadre in the above field for three years. Must be conversant with Social Media handles. Preference would be given to candidates having experience in Software like Protocol / Corol Freehand, etc. Must be thorough with feeding google sheets, Portal Updating, etc.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Mormugao Port Authority Media Coordinator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Media Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Media Coordinator position at Mormugao Port Authority is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Media Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Media Coordinator post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 70,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Media Coordinator position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Mass Communication or Journalism, along with specific PG diplomas and knowledge of Konkani and Marathi.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any experience required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have at least 3 years of experience in an Executive or Supervisory cadre in a relevant field.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Media Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Media Coordinator position is 45 years.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Media Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the Media Coordinator post announced by Mormugao Port Authority.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Media Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Which languages are essential for the Media Coordinator role?
faq.answer: Knowledge of Konkani and Marathi languages is essential for the Media Coordinator position.
